findings.justification: An authenticated admin can supply arbitrary strings via $_REQUEST['capabilities'] to enumerate users holding any capability (including non-standard or custom ones), since there is no allowlist validation — only sanitize_key — before the value is passed to WP_User_Query.

Two WP_User_Query calls use 'number' => -1 (no pagination limit), which fetches all matching users and their metadata into memory at once; on large sites this is triggerable by any manage_options user and could exhaust PHP memory or cause timeouts.
